channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A new lawsuit alleges DHS illegally tracked and intimidated observers
item.description: Observers watching federal immigration enforcement in Maine who were told by agents they were "domestic terrorists" and would be added to a "database"...

item.title: A powerful winter storm is roiling travel across the northeastern U.S.
item.description: Forecasters called travel conditions "extremely treacherous" and "nearly impossible" in areas hit hardest by the storm, and air and train traffic is a...

item.title: BAFTAs apologize after guest with Tourette syndrome uses racial slur during ceremony
item.description: A man with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur and other offensive remarks during the BAFTA awards ceremony Sunday. The BBC did not edit out his o...

item.title: The FDA creates a quicker path for gene therapies
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration aims to evaluate treatments for rare diseases based on plausible evidence that they would work â without requiring a ...

item.title: 'Everything was in pieces:' Lindsey Vonn describes grueling surgery on broken leg
item.description: In a recent video, the Olympic skier credits her surgeon with saving her leg from potential amputation.

item.title: Tariffs pose "huge uncertainty" after Supreme Court ruling, experts say
item.description: The Trump administration is unlikely to back down from pursuing additional tariffs following the Supreme Court decision, according to trade experts.

item.title: Australia backs removing Andrew from royal line of succession
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor remains eighth in line to the throne despite being stripped of his titles.

item.title: Armed man killed after entering secure perimeter of Trump's residence, Secret Service says
item.description: The suspect was carrying a shotgun and fuel can when he was killed, officers say, while Trump was in Washington DC at the time.

item.title: Snow still falling across Northeast U.S. as massive blizzard continues track
item.description: More than half a million power outages have been reported across the East Coast as a historic blizzard continues to impact states from Maryland to Mai...

item.title: Ukraine negotiator tells BBC how it feels to sit across table from Russia
item.description: Sergiy Kyslytsya is among those trying to negotiate an end to the conflict, which is entering its fifth year.

item.title: EU fails to pass new sanctions targeting Russia after Hungary objects
Rob Jetten becomes Netherlands' youngest ever PM
item.description: The 38-year-old is sworn in as premier after clinching a narrow victory in October's election.

item.title: Intense Northeast blizzard had a âGoldilocksâ situation to roll up monster snow totals
item.description: Meteorologists say the powerful norâeaster smacking the Northeast is a classic, record-setting blizzard.

item.title: Latest on Trump's plan to raise global tariffs to 15% after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: President Trump said Saturday that he will raise global tariffs to 15% after the Supreme Court struck down a set of sweeping global tariffs in a decis...

item.title: Some U.S. Embassy staff in Beirut ordered to leave amid escalating tensions
item.description: The State Department has ordered some staff in the U.S. Embassy in Beirut to begin to leave Lebanon, multiple sources familiar with the matter said.

item.title: Watch: Yosemite waterfall turns molten orange
item.description: The event occurs only in February, when the setting sun hits Horsetail Fall in Yosemite National Park at just the right angle.

item.title: Dow slides nearly 800 points as AI and tariff risks rattle investors
item.description: The Dow Jones slid nearly 800 points as investors fret over AI disruption and react to President Trump's new tariff agenda.

item.title: Prosecutors stand by former militantâs conviction but blast judgeâs prior conduct as prosecutor
